name: FNaF: Below The Surface (SL ERP)
description:
Five Night’s at Freddy’s:

Below The Surface

A Sister Location Erotic Role-Play

play as your own character working in Circus Baby’s Entertainment & Rentals, but deep below underground, these animatronics aren’t as cute as they seem. Explore the bunker, work on tasks, and ‘help’ the animatronic performers…
creator: Kakushitsu
